theme: Foundations of Bhakti and Sacred Culture
summary: Students establish a steady devotional rhythm while learning the philosophical and cultural essentials of Krishna consciousness.

courses.title: Bhagavad Gita
courses.focus: Core teachings on identity, duty, devotion, and spiritual practice.

courses.title: Sri Isopanisad
courses.focus: A concise introduction to the personal nature of the Absolute Truth and God-centered living.

summary: Students deepen their internal practice and learn how to embody thoughtful leadership through service and relationships.

courses.title: Nectar of Instruction
courses.focus: Practical guidance for personal discipline, saintly association, and progressive spiritual growth.

courses.title: Nectar of Devotion
courses.focus: The science and mood of devotional service, expressed through study, reflection, and community living.
